---
title: "Galleria fotografica"
description: "Uno sguardo più personale"
lang: it
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| output: asis
# Auto-sync the Italian gallery from the English photos.qmd so new
# photos never have to be added twice. We only translate the section
# chrome and rewrite asset paths for the /it/ subdirectory.
# (execute-dir is set to "project", so this reads the root file.)
lines <- readLines("photos.qmd", warn = FALSE)
yend  <- which(lines == "---")[2]
body  <- paste(lines[(yend + 1):length(lines)], collapse = "\n")

body <- gsub("Plates · A personal album", "Tavole · Un album personale", body, fixed = TRUE)
body <- gsub(
  "A more personal glimpse of my life through pictures that reflect my passions, my academic collaborations, and above all, the people I care about.",
  "Uno sguardo più personale sulla mia vita attraverso immagini che riflettono le mie passioni, le mie collaborazioni accademiche e, soprattutto, le persone a cui tengo.",
  body, fixed = TRUE)
body <- gsub("## Family",  "## Famiglia", body, fixed = TRUE)
body <- gsub("## Friends", "## Amici",    body, fixed = TRUE)
body <- gsub("## Work",    "## Lavoro",   body, fixed = TRUE)

# Resolve the gallery assets from the /it/ subdirectory
body <- gsub("photos/", "../photos/", body, fixed = TRUE)

cat(body)
```
